assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan.md, Branch Operations (Step 5): "git checkout TC-9005\ngit pull\ngit checkout -b TC-9205" — explicitly checks out TC-9005 before creating the task branch, and states "Since the Target Branch is TC-9005 (a feature branch), NOT main".

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan.md, Push and PR Creation (Step 10): "gh pr create --base TC-9005 --head TC-9205" and "The --base TC-9005 flag ensures the PR targets the feature branch, not main."

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan.md, Branch Operations (Step 5): "git checkout -b TC-9205" and "This creates the task branch TC-9205 based on the feature branch TC-9005. The task branch is named after the task issue ID (TC-9205), which is distinct from the parent feature branch (TC-9005)."

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan.md, Code Inspection Plan (Step 4) references all three files: "1. migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs -- use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview", "2. entity/src/advisory.rs -- use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to verify that the status column is no longer referenced", "3. migration/src/lib.rs -- use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to see the current migration registration pattern".

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan.md, Commit Message section: "git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table..."" — explicitly uses the --trailer flag with the correct value.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: Plan.md, Commit Message section: The message is "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table" which follows type(scope): description format. The footer contains "Implements TC-9205" referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: Plan.md, Task Parsing (Step 1): "Target Branch: TC-9005 (a feature branch, NOT main)" and Branch Operations (Step 5): "Since the Target Branch is TC-9005 (a feature branch), NOT main, the branch operations are:" — clearly identifies and calls out TC-9005 as the target branch extracted from the task description.
